_comment: Declare which files/dirs are in scope for the CURRENT task before editing existing (git-tracked) files. Glob patterns relative to project root, ** and * and ? supported. Anything git-tracked that is NOT matched here triggers an 'ask' permission prompt from .claude/hooks/guard-protected-paths.js instead of a silent edit. New/untracked files are always allowed regardless of this file. Clear or narrow this list when a task finishes so the next task starts from a protected baseline.
task: mobile bug/perf/security hardening pass + Roadmaps feature port (mobile-only, web/backend untouched). Web signup/login flow debug-fix plan (docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-17-signup-login-flow-fixes.md) is complete — narrowed back out of scope.
